action: sudo sh -c 'for f in /sys/bus/usb/devices/*/authorized; do echo 0 > "$f"; done'

# Create a udev rule to disable all USB devices
sudo sh -c 'cat > /etc/udev/rules.d/99-disable-usb.rules <<EOF
ACTION=="add", SUBSYSTEM=="usb", ATTR{authorized}="0"
EOF'
# Reload udev rules and trigger them
sudo udevadm control --reload-rules
sudo udevadm trigger

# Disable the USB storage driver and block all USB devices
sudo modprobe -r usb_storage
sudo sh -c 'echo "blacklist usb_storage" > /etc/modprobe.d/blacklist-usb.conf'
# Apply the udev rule immediately
sudo udevadm control --reload-rules
sudo udevadm trigger
sudo sh -c 'for f in /sys/bus/usb/devices/*/authorized; do echo 0 > "$f"; done'
sudo sh -c 'for d in /sys/bus/usb/devices/*; do echo 0 > "$d/authorized" 2>/dev/null; done'

# Create a udev rule that immediately disables any USB device that is added
sudo sh -c 'echo "ACTION==\"add\", SUBSYSTEM==\"usb\", ATTR{authorized}=\"0\"" > /etc/udev/rules.d/99-usb-block.rules'
# Reload udev rules and trigger them to apply the rule to existing devices
sudo udevadm control --reload-rules
sudo udevadm trigger
sudo sh -c 'for d in /sys/bus/usb/devices/*; do echo 0 > "$d/authorized" 2>/dev/null; done'
sudo sh -c 'for d in /sys/bus/usb/devices/*; do echo 0 > "$d/authorized" 2>/dev/null; done'

sudo sh -c 'cat > /usr/local/bin/usb-disable.sh <<EOF
#!/bin/bash
for d in /sys/bus/usb/devices/*; do
echo 0 > "$d/authorized" 2>/dev/null
done
EOF
chmod +x /usr/local/bin/usb-disable.sh
cat > /etc/systemd/system/usb-disable.service <<EOF
[Unit]
Description=Disable all USB ports
After=network.target
[Service]
Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/usb-disable.sh
RemainAfterExit=yes
[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF
systemctl daemon-reload
systemctl enable --now usb-disable.service'

sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl enable --now usb-disable.service

sudo bash -c 'cat > /usr/local/bin/usb-disable.sh <<EOF
#!/bin/bash
for d in /sys/bus/usb/devices/usb*; do
echo 0 > "$d/authorized"
done
EOF
chmod +x /usr/local/bin/usb-disable.sh'

sudo bash -c 'cat > /etc/systemd/system/usb-disable.service <<EOF
[Unit]
Description=Disable all USB ports
After=network.target
[Service]
Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/usb-disable.sh
RemainAfterExit=yes
User=root
[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF
systemctl daemon-reload
systemctl enable --now usb-disable.service'
